generated_oml:
instance DS18S20Sensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance DS18S20Sensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance DS18S20Sensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors used for model training and validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 2 parameters calibrated using non-linear least squares optimization with Scipy"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 4 parameters calibrated using non-linear least squares optimization with Scipy"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for transmitting temperature data from physical sensors to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables SafetyMonitoringService
]

instance RaspberryPiEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller managing GPIO signals and sensor communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance ScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization package for non-linear least squares calibration of thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService, SimulationService
]

instance OneWireProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol for communication with DS18S20 temperature sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables SafetyMonitoringService
]

instance GitHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source code storage and version control"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models for temperature prediction using Model A and Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationDecision
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for parameter optimization of thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdate
]

instance SafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Safety monitoring alerts based on temperature thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringAlert
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for ensuring optimal and safe operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance SafetyMonitoringAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert triggered when temperature exceeds safe thresholds"
]

instance OptimizationDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimization decisions based on model predictions for system control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterUpdate : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Parameter updates derived from calibration processes"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time state estimation for optimal and safe operation"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214x214x3 mm) controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB, managed by Raspberry Pi GPIO for 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system management and data processing"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RaspberryPi4, PCB, PowerSupply, StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heating on/off, fan speed) generated by the Digital Twin controller are sent through RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which actuates the heatbed and fan via MOSFETs."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of RabbitMQ communication server, Raspberry Pi-based controller, low-level driver, and simulation models to enable real-time data exchange and control between physical and virtual components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, integrating models post-deployment for monitoring and prediction of current operating conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via experimental comparison of model predictions against real-world data, residual error minimization using Scipy's optimization function, and testing assumptions (e.g., temperature uniformity)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) for message-based communication between Physical Twin and Digital Twin components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin components hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, including RabbitMQ server, controller, and low-level driver."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol implemented in the low-level driver to maintain device safety during actuation."
]
